item.title: Export full 240fps slo-mo videos from your iPhone
item.description: You can export full 240fps videos from your iPhone without any additional apps.
item.author: Ben Stolovitz

item.title: Consider the chairmaker
item.description: Software engineering is currently artisanal, but AI is making software much cheaper to make. What can we learn from the history of industrial design? Can we bring taste into a world of programming no longer dominated by artisans?
item.author: Ben Stolovitz

item.title: Big noun pages
item.description: Big noun pages (like 'Visual Studio') make your documentation better. Here's why.
item.author: Ben Stolovitz

item.title: Visualizing audio compressors
item.description: I made a visualizer for audio compressors (dynamic range compression) because I found compressors hard to understand.
item.author: Ben Stolovitz

item.title: My Huel had some cadmium and no detectable lead
item.description: I tested Huel Ready-to-Drink Chocolate and found 6mcg/kg of cadmium; no detectable lead, mercury, & arsenic.
item.author: Ben Stolovitz

item.title: How I use AI (Oct 2025)
item.description: AI has transformed how I code and do research. Here’s where it’s good and where it is lacking.
item.author: Ben Stolovitz

item.title: Accessible design is design
item.description: Good design requires designing for accessibility, but designing for accessibility is itself a design process. It can't be done simply by checklist.
item.author: Ben Stolovitz

item.title: What's in an (accessible) name?
item.description: Most UI has good accessible names by default. But when do you need to write your own? And how?
item.author: Ben Stolovitz

item.title: Resize a window in WinUI (part 2: resize the window)
item.description: Once you can calculate DPI for your app, how can you use it to size your windows properly? Let's find out.
item.author: Ben Stolovitz

item.title: Resize a window in WinUI (part 1: find the DPI)
item.description: To resize a window, you must know its DPI. Let's figure it out.
item.author: Ben Stolovitz

item.title: Resize a window in WinUI (part 0: what is DPI)
item.description: Learn about DPI-awareness and scale factors to understand window resizing in WinUI and Win32.
item.author: Ben Stolovitz

item.title: TikTok will always be temporary
item.description: Everything on the Internet is temporary. So what do I do?
item.author: Ben Stolovitz

item.title: (Don't) make Narrator read things
item.description: You can force screen readers to announce things, but you probably shouldn't. Here's why.
item.author: Ben Stolovitz

item.title: Computers should beep more
item.description: Sound can make you more productive if it's calm & played at the right moment. I saved 30min a week.
item.author: Ben Stolovitz

item.title: Zotero + your Synology NAS
item.description: Here's how you can automatically sync Zotero to your Synology NAS via WebDAV.
item.author: Ben Stolovitz

item.title: Besto's registry keys
item.description: When I set up new computers, here are some registry keys I like to use!
item.author: Ben Stolovitz

item.title: Does it matter where you work?
item.description: "Should I work for a small startup or a big company?" In some ways, it matters, in others, it doesn't. But do you always have a choice?
item.author: Ben Stolovitz

item.title: A proper hello
item.description: A proper introduction to Ben.Stolovitz, and why it's nice to build your own spaces.
item.author: Ben Stolovitz
